evals.name: url-audit-real-site
evals.prompt: Audit the SEO of https://example.com and tell me what to fix.
evals.expected_output: Runs the audit script, produces a scored report with specific failures and fix suggestions. Should mention example.com lacks meta description and structured data.

evals.name: html-file-ecommerce-product
evals.prompt: I have a product page HTML file at /tmp/eval-product-page.html. Can you check if it's SEO-optimized? I want to know what's missing.
evals.expected_output: Runs the audit script on the local file, identifies missing/incomplete on-page SEO items (should catch missing alt text, generic filenames, no schema, missing meta description), and gives concrete fixes.

evals.name: vague-seo-review-request
evals.prompt: My blog post at https://example.com isn't ranking. Can you help me figure out why?
evals.expected_output: Should recognize this as an SEO audit request (even without the word 'audit'), run the checklist, and lead with the 2-3 most impactful issues. Should not just give generic SEO advice — should use the structured checklist.
